childhood.familyBackground: Youngest brother of Koo Bon-moo (former LG Group chairman). Part of the prominent LG Family established by Koo In-hoe (founder) and deeply rooted in technology and manufacturing traditions.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 구본무 전 LG그룹 회장의 막내 형제. 창업자 구인회로부터 시작된 저명한 LG가문의 일원으로 기술·제조 전통에 깊이 있다.
childhood.education: Higher education in technical fields; specialized in industrial management
childhood.educationKo: 기술 분야 고등 교육; 산업 경영 전문화
childhood.earlyLife: Born in the early 1960s in Seoul to a family with deep technological heritage. Grew up in LG's founding environment during Korea's rapid industrialization period. Followed the family tradition of focusing on core technology and manufacturing excellence rather than diversification.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1960년대 초반 서울에서 태어나 기술 유산이 풍부한 가족에서 성장했다. 한국의 급속한 산업화 시기에 LG 창업 환경에서 자랐다. 다각화보다는 핵심 기술과 제조 우수성에 집중하는 가문의 전통을 계승했다.

careerTimeline.event: Separated from LG with brother Koo Bon-neung; established independent company holdings
careerTimeline.eventKo: 형 구본능과 함께 LG에서 분리, 독립 회사 설립

careerTimeline.event: Led spinoff of specialized technology company with focus on core manufacturing
careerTimeline.eventKo: 핵심 제조 기술에 중심을 두고 계열사 분리

careerTimeline.event: Continued managing family technology-focused holdings; LT Group becomes established platform
careerTimeline.eventKo: 기술 중심 계열사 경영 계속, LT그룹 확립

careerTimeline.event: Wealth stabilizes around $1.8-2.0 billion USD through diversified industrial holdings
careerTimeline.eventKo: 다각적 산업 지주를 통해 순자산 약 18-20억 달러 유지

personalTraits.knownFor: Preserving LG Family's technology-first management philosophy; maintaining lean, focused industrial operations; technical expertise
personalTraits.knownForKo: LG가문의 기술 우선 경영 철학 계승; 간결하고 집중된 산업 운영 유지; 기술 전문성
